question: उप-जिलों को उनकी कुल एलोपैथिक आउटपेशेंट उपस्थिति के आधार पर, उच्चतम से निम्नतम तक क्रमबद्ध करें।

predicted_sql:

ORDER BY total_outpatient_attendance DESC;

question: कौन से ग्रामीण उप-जिलों में कुल 500 से अधिक बीसीजी टीकाकरण दर्ज किए गए हैं?

predicted_sql:
SELECT dg.sub_district
FROM dim_geography dg
JOIN fact_child_immunization_routine fcir ON dg.geography_id = fcir.geography_id
WHERE dg.type_of_area ILIKE 'rural'
GROUP BY dg.sub_district
HAVING SUM(fcir.bcg_vaccine) > 500;
raw_output:
SELECT dg.sub_district
FROM dim_geography dg
JOIN fact_child_immunization_routine fcir ON dg.geography_id = fcir.geography_id
WHERE dg.type_of_area ILIKE 'rural'
GROUP BY dg.sub_district
HAVING SUM(fcir.bcg_vaccine) > 500;

question: राज्य और क्षेत्र प्रकार के अनुसार विवरण प्रदान करें जो पेंटावैलेंट वैक्सीन की पहली खुराक के औसत के साथ-साथ बीसीजी टीकाकरण की कुल संख्या दर्शाता है।

SELECT g.state, g.type_of_area, AVG(cir.pentavalent_1) AS avg_pentavalent_1_dose, SUM(cir.bcg_vaccine) AS total_bcg_vaccinations

JOIN fact_child_immunization_routine cir ON g.geography_id = cir.geography_id
GROUP BY g.state, g.type_of_area
ORDER BY g.state, g.type_of_area;
raw_output:

FROM dim_geography g

WHERE t.year = 2022
AND (m.pregnant_women_registered_for_anc > 500 OR m.number_of_pregnancy_test_kits_used > 200)
ORDER BY g.sub_district ASC;

       SUM(fpm.immunisation_sessions_held) AS total_sessions_held,

JOIN fact_program_management fpm ON dg.geography_id = fpm.geography_id
JOIN dim_time dt ON fpm.time_id = dt.time_id
WHERE dt.year = 2020
GROUP BY dg.sub_district;

question: वर्ष 2020 के लिए, अंडमान और निकोबार द्वीप समूह के प्रत्येक उप-जिले के टीकाकरण सत्र आँकड़े और परिवार नियोजन वितरण विवरण प्रदान करें।

predicted_sql:
SELECT
    dg.sub_district,
    SUM(fpm.immunisation_sessions_planned) AS total_sessions_planned,
    SUM(fpm.immunisation_sessions_held) AS total_sessions_held,
    SUM(fpm.immunisation_sessions_with_asha_present) AS total_sessions_with_asha,
    SUM(fpm.combined_oral_pill_cycles_distributed) AS total_pill_cycles,

FROM dim_geography dg
JOIN fact_program_management fpm ON dg.geography_id = fpm.geography_id

question: 2021 के लिए अंडमान और निकोबार द्वीप समूह में, उन क्षेत्रों के लिए जहां कम से कम एक सत्र नियोजित था, नियोजित और आयोजित टीकाकरण सत्रों का उप-जिला विवरण प्रदान करें, साथ ही मौखिक गोलियों और कंडोम के वितरण के कुल आंकड़े दें। परिणामों को आयोजित सत्रों की संख्या के आधार पर क्रमबद्ध करें।
gold_sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT, SUM(T3.IMMUNISATION_SESSIONS_PLANNED), SUM(T3.IMMUNISATION_SESSIONS_HELD), SUM(T3.COMBINED_ORAL_PILL_CYCLES_DISTRIBUTED), SUM(T3.CONDOM_PIECES_DISTRIBUTED) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 INNER JOIN FACT_PROGRAM_MANAGEMENT AS T3 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T3.GEOGRAPHY_ID INNER JOIN DIM_TIME AS T2 ON T3.TIME_ID = T2.TIME_ID WHERE T1.STATE = 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands' AND T2.YEAR = '2021' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT HAVING SUM(T3.IMMUNISATION_SESSIONS_PLANNED) > 0 ORDER BY SUM(T3.IMMUNISATION_SESSIONS_HELD) DESC
predicted_sql:
SELECT
    dg.sub_district,
    SUM(fpm.immunisation_sessions_planned) AS total_sessions_planned,
    SUM(fpm.immunisation_sessions_held) AS total_sessions_held,
    SUM(fpm.combined_oral_pill_cycles_distributed) AS total_oral_pills,
    SUM(fpm.condom_pieces_distributed) AS total_condoms
FROM fact_program_management fpm
JOIN dim_geography dg ON fpm.geography_id = dg.geography_id
JOIN dim_time dt ON fpm.time_id = dt.time_id
WHERE dt.year = 2021
    AND dg.state ILIKE 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands'
    AND fpm.immunisation_sessions_planned >= 1
GROUP BY dg.sub_district
ORDER BY total_sessions_held DESC;
raw_output:
SELECT
    dg.sub_district,
    SUM(fpm.immunisation_sessions_planned) AS total_sessions_planned,
    SUM(fpm.immunisation_sessions_held) AS total_sessions_held,
    SUM(fpm.combined_oral_pill_cycles_distributed) AS total_oral_pills,
    SUM(fpm.condom_pieces_distributed) AS total_condoms
FROM fact_program_management fpm
JOIN dim_geography dg ON fpm.geography_id = dg.geography_id
JOIN dim_time dt ON fpm.time_id = dt.time_id
WHERE dt.year = 2021
    AND dg.state ILIKE 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands'
    AND fpm.immunisation_sessions_planned >= 1
GROUP BY dg.sub_district
ORDER BY total_sessions_held DESC;

अंडमान और निकोबार द्वीप समूह के उप-जिलों के लिए 2021 के कार्यक्रम प्रबंधन विवरण, जिसमें टीकाकरण सत्र और कंडोम वितरण शामिल हैं, क्षेत्र प्रकार के अनुसार वर्गीकृत करके प्रदान करें।
gold_sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT, T1.TYPE_OF_AREA, T2.YEAR, T3.IMMUNISATION_SESSIONS_PLANNED, T3.IMMUNISATION_SESSIONS_HELD, T3.CONDOM_PIECES_DISTRIBUTED FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_PROGRAM_MANAGEMENT AS T3 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T3.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_TIME AS T2 ON T3.TIME_ID = T2.TIME_ID WHERE T1.STATE = 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands' AND T2.YEAR = '2021' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT, T1.TYPE_OF_AREA, T2.YEAR, T3.IMMUNISATION_SESSIONS_PLANNED, T3.IMMUNISATION_SESSIONS_HELD, T3.CONDOM_PIECES_DISTRIBUTED ORDER BY T1.TYPE_OF_AREA
predicted_sql:
SELECT
    dg.sub_district,
    dg.type_of_area,
    dt.year,
    dt.month,
    fpm.immunisation_sessions_planned,
    fpm.immunisation_sessions_held,
    fpm.immunisation_sessions_with_asha_present,
    fpm.combined_oral_pill_cycles_distributed,
    fpm.condom_pieces_distributed
FROM fact_program_management fpm
JOIN dim_geography dg ON fpm.geography_id = dg.geography_id
JOIN dim_time dt ON fpm.time_id = dt.time_id
WHERE dg.state ILIKE 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands'
    AND dt.year = 2021
ORDER BY dg.sub_district, dg.type_of_area, dt.month;

    dg.sub_district,
    dg.type_of_area,
    dt.year,

    fpm.immunisation_sessions_with_asha_present,
    fpm.combined_oral_pill_cycles_distributed,
    fpm.condom_pieces_distributed
FROM fact_program_management fpm
JOIN dim_geography dg ON fpm.geography_id = dg.geography_id

WHERE dg.state ILIKE 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands'

question: वर्ष 2022 के लिए, कुल आयोजित टीकाकरण सत्रों और एक आशा कार्यकर्ता द्वारा भाग लिए गए औसत सत्रों की संख्या की उप-जिले के अनुसार विवरण प्रदान करें, जो उच्चतम से निम्नतम गतिविधि के अनुसार क्रमबद्ध हो।

predicted_sql:
SELECT dg.sub_district, 
       SUM(fp.immunisation_sessions_held) AS total_immunisation_sessions_held,
       SUM(fp.immunisation_sessions_with_asha_present) AS total_immunisation_sessions_with_asha_present,
       AVG(fp.immunisation_sessions_with_asha_present) AS average_sessions_with_asha_present
FROM fact_program_management fp
JOIN dim_time dt ON fp.time_id = dt.time_id
JOIN dim_geography dg ON fp.geography_id = dg.geography_id
WHERE dt.year = 2022
GROUP BY dg.sub_district
ORDER BY total_immunisation_sessions_held DESC;
